sentiment: Every map is a quiet argument that the world can be known, one careful line at a time.

stories.title: Jerry's Map
stories.summary: A decades-long project of hand-drawing a fictional map, one small section at a time.

stories.title: Show HN: An ASCII 3D Rendering Engine
stories.summary: Building a 3D renderer from ASCII characters — creative constraint as a medium.

stories.title: Vulnerability reports are not special anymore
stories.summary: On the changing landscape of security disclosure and the erosion of trust in the process.
